title: [FATAL] [lib.rs:477] ["called `Result::unwrap()` on an `Err` value: ParseIntError { kind: PosOverflow }"]
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
```sql
CREATE TABLE t1 ( c1 float);
INSERT INTO t1 (c1) VALUES (-1.6175244930418992E38);
SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE CONV(c1, 8, 6);
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
The statement is normally executed.
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
The server crashed.
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
Release Version: v8.0.0
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 8ba1fa452b1ccdbfb85879ea94b9254aabba2916
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2024-03-28 14:22:15
GoVersion: go1.21.4
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 ( c1 float, c2 int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
SELECT c1 FROM t2 WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT c1 FROM t2 WHERE c2 = (SELECT MAX(c2) FROM t2);
key_bug_features: SELECT with CONV on float causing server crash
